class.help: Codificadora de Causas de los conflictos (carpetas): lesión auditiva, diferencia en remuneración, hernia, etc.
class.label: Causa
class.name: CAUSA

qry:select.name: sql1
qry:select.qry:xquery: for $r in sql('SELECT t0.oi_causa as oi_causa, t0.c_causa as c_causa, t0.d_causa as d_causa, SEC.policy, t0.c_causa as CODE, t0.d_causa as TEXT FROM LEG30_CAUSAS as t0,NMD_SECURITY(class=\'NucleusRH.Base.Legales.Causas.CAUSA\') as SEC JOIN t0.oi_causa LEFT OUTER SEC.id ORDER BY oi_causa asc')/ROWS/ROW

qry:select.name: sql1
qry:select.qry:xquery: for $r in sql('SELECT t0.oi_causa as oi_causa, SEC.policy FROM LEG30_CAUSAS as t0,NMD_SECURITY(class=\'NucleusRH.Base.Legales.Causas.CAUSA\') as SEC JOIN t0.oi_causa LEFT OUTER SEC.id ORDER BY oi_causa asc')/ROWS/ROW

qry:select.name: NucleusRH.Base.Legales.Causas.CAUSA.QUERY
NucleusRH.Base.Legales.Causas.CAUSA.COUNT
qry:select.qry:xquery:
for $r in SQL(' select Count(LEG30_CAUSAS.oi_causa) as CNT from LEG30_CAUSAS Where 1=1 {%? (#SOURCE:@OI_FIND='') {% %} {% and LEG30_CAUSAS.oi_causa={#SOURCE:@OI_FIND} %} %} {%? (#SOURCE:@TXT_FIND='') {% %} {% and (contain(LEG30_CAUSAS.d_causa,{#SOURCE:@TXT_FIND}) or contain(LEG30_CAUSAS.c_causa,{#SOURCE:@TXT_FIND})) %} %} {%? (#SOURCE:@OI_PARENT='') {% %} {% and [PARENT]={#SOURCE:@OI_PARENT} %} %}
{%? (#SOURCE:@WHERE='') {% %} {% and {%=#SOURCE:@WHERE %} %} %}')/ROWS/ROW
